creator: saper@saper.info
text:
On Mon, 18 Apr 2011, Jason E. Hale wrote:

> I submitted ports/155200 a while back to update devel/libchipcard to 5.0.0,
> but no action has been taken.  IMO the stable version should be used rather
> than a test version.  In either case devel/libchipcard-kde would have to be
> removed from the ports tree also.

Ah, sorry, I checked the PR database a while ago, not just before submitting :(

I think "test" refers to the special "test" program for STARTCOS cards,
so there is nothing implying that existing support is not stable.

Feel free to merge the requests - maybe you should even take over maintainership,
as I am not sure Martin is using FreeBSD those days.

You might want to consider including patches I have posted - one
enables use of limited symbol visibility with our gcc and the second
one fixes compilation problem with pcsc-lite >= 1.6.2 (not FreeBSD specific,
will report upstream).

Whatever said, 5.0.1.t works for me like a charm :)

Can anyone update port summary to "Update libchipcard to 5.0.1test" ?

//Marcin
